samples.text: No reptiles have fur. A snake is a reptile. Does the snake have fur?
Reptiles do not possess fur. A snake belongs to the reptile category. Does the snake possess fur?
Animals classified as reptiles are not furry. A snake is classified as a reptile. Is the snake furry?
No reptilian animals have hair-like fur. A snake is a reptilian animal. Does the snake have fur?
Snakes are reptiles. Reptiles do not have fur. Therefore, does a snake have fur?
No reptiles have fur. Cars usually have four wheels. A snake is a reptile. Does the snake have fur?
